name: Oriental Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs kidney beans (canned, such as Goya)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain one can of kidney beans and reserve the liquid from the other can.
2. In a wok or heavy-bottomed pan, heat a small amount of sesame oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the onion and sauté until translucent, set aside.
4. Mash about 2 tablespoons of kidney beans with a fork to create a creamy mixture.
5. Add the mashed beans, juice from one can of kidney beans, Szechuan sauce (taste first; start with 3 teaspoons), and Vegeta to the pan with the sautéed onions.
6. Crush or mince the garlic cloves.
7. Stir in the crushed garlic just before turning off the heat.
8. Mix everything together, cover, and let sit for a few minutes.
9. Serve over rice; this dish serves 3-4 people.
This recipe was adapted from an online source, aiming to provide the best taste-to-effort ratio.
